(2) Every teacher and member of the academic staff of the University t e l l be appointed on a written contract, the form of which shall be prescribed by the Ordinances, (3) Acopy of every contract referred to in clause (2) shall be deposited with the Registrar (4) The age of superannuation for all the persons who were holding teaching positions on regular employment against sanctioned post as on 15.03.2007 would be 63 yean and thereafter no extension in the service would be given. However, it will be open to the University to re employ a superannuated teacher up to the age of 70 yean.
